description: Replete with all the contemporary technologies and a durable upper body, the lotto Ace shoes keep your feet firmly on the ground. Stylish to look at and great to wear, these shoes team perfectly with jeans and tees for a cool casual look off the ground.Upper Synthetic upper with stitch detailing for lightweight durability Perforations on the upper for breathability Mesh lining on the collar and below the synthetic tongue for durability and ventilation Knitted lace for extended durability and snug Fit Outsole extended and embedded onto the heel Midsole Soft, cushy footbed for all day in-step comfort EVA injected midsole for lightweight comfort and enhanced shock absorption Outsole Air cushioning below the heel for maximum traction Flex grooves for much greater traction shoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
